note: Recentered XZ line-art for the minimap. Coords = world XZ minus offset[0]/offset[2]. Boundary-edge outlines (edges used by exactly one triangle). Segments are [x1,z1,x2,z2]. fillRoad = base64 of a fillN x fillN 1-bit road occupancy grid (row-major, bit i = cell i), cell (col,row) spans world [-worldHalfExtent..+worldHalfExtent] in X (col) and Z (row).
